title: [$250] "Move to Report" unavailable on rejected-back-to-Draft expense reports

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
## Problem When a report is submitted, approved (forwarded), and then rejected back to the submitter, the submitter can no longer move expenses to a different report. The "Move to Report" bulk action is missing from the UI, even though the report is back in Draft/Open state and all other expense fields remain editable. ## Root Cause [`isReportOutstanding`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L11500-L11509) returns `false` whenever [`hasForwardedAction`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L11489-L11492) finds **any** historical `FORWARDED` action on the report. After rejection, the report's `stateNum`/`statusNum` are correctly set back to `OPEN`, but the `FORWARDED` action from the prior approval cycle remains in the report's action history (and should remain for audit trail purposes). This causes `isReportOutstanding` to return `false`, which blocks [`canEditFieldOfMoneyRequest`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L4994) for the `REPORT` field, hiding the "Move to Report" option. Other expense fields (category, tag, description, amount, merchant, date) are unaffected because they don't go through the `isReportOutstanding` gate — only the `REPORT` field does. ## Steps to Reproduce 1. Create expenses and add them to a Draft report 2. Submit the report 3. Have an approver approve (forward) the report 4. Have a subsequent approver reject the report back to the submitter 5. As the submitter, select one or more expenses on the now-Draft report 6. Click the bulk action button — "Move to Report" is missing **Expected:** "Move to Report" should be available since the report is back in Draft/Open state. **Actual:** "Move to Report" is not shown. ## Recommended Fix `isReportOutstanding` should check the report's current `stateNum`/`statusNum` before (or instead of) consulting `hasForwardedAction`. If the report is in `OPEN` state, a stale `FORWARDED` action from a prior approval cycle should not block it. This is a frontend-only fix — the backend does not check for forwarded actions in this path. Confirmed by `luacmartins` and `trjExpensify` in Expensify/Expensify\#631119. ## Relevant Code - [`hasForwardedAction` — `ReportUtils.ts:11489-11492`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L11489-L11492) — checks if any `FORWARDED` action exists (no cycle awareness) - [`isReportOutstanding` — `ReportUtils.ts:11500-11509`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L11500-L11509) — returns `false` when `hasForwardedAction` is `true`, never reaching the state check - [`canEditFieldOfMoneyRequest` — `ReportUtils.ts:4994`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/libs/ReportUtils.ts#L4994) — gates the "Move to Report" option on `isReportOutstanding` - [`useSearchBulkActions.ts:1363`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/f59bcc3007140ead7efdbca4c31dc73366bc58df/src/hooks/useSearchBulkActions.ts#L1363) — where `canAllTransactionsBeMoved` controls "Move to Report" visibility - PR that introduced the move-to-report feature: Expensify/App#58597 ## Related - Internal issue: Expensify/Expensify\#631119

  • Upwork Job URL: https://www.upwork.com/jobs/~022051716961381172423
  • Upwork Job ID: 2051716961381172423
  • Last Price Increase: 2026-05-05

Login into the App with a new account 2. Disable internet connection on the device. 3. Navigate to a chat and upload an attachment (image). 4. Verify that the image preview appears immediately in the chat. 5. Close/force-kill the app while still offline. 6. Reopen the app and then enable internet connection (refresh if needed). ## Expected Result: The attachment should remain visible in the chat after reopening the app offline, and once the device goes online it should sync and appear normally (without reduced opacity). ## Actual Result: The attachment uploaded while offline disappears after closing and reopening the app. It does not sync or appear once the internet connection is restored. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e3c70e3c-dc53-4943-a47c-91750a12cab0 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Sign in to ND 2. Navigate to the Workspace chat 3. Create an empty report 4. Right click on the report and click "Reply in thread" 5. Verify the message preview for the report in LHN displays "No activity yet" 6. Click on the Search icon 7. Verify the message preview in search router displays "No activity yet" 8. Create a Scan Expense inside this empty report by uploading a receipt 9. Immediately observe the message preview in the LHN and Search Router while the receipt is Scanning 10. Verify during Receipt Scanning both LHN and Search router show "Receipt scanning..." 11. Wait for the scanning to complete 12. Verify both LHN and Search show the exact same message ## Expected Result: Report preview message in Search matches the message in LHN ## Actual Result: Report preview message is not shown in Search when click "Reply in thread", while scanning a receipt, or for the scanned expense ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3cd7c24-ff4c-4f68-bfd2-f8dc6236a347 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
